assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, an OAuth-capable Google or GitHub identity, and a payment card.
No Together AI account, organization, project, credits, API key, or request exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Together AI account, fund the prepaid minimum credits, create a project API key, and run the official Python first chat query.

first_success.outcome: The Python Together SDK sends the published MiniMax M3 chat prompt and prints the returned answer.
first_success.observable_signal: After running the Quickstart script, the model response appears in the terminal.

route_selection.surface: Together AI self-service web signup plus official Quickstart Python SDK
route_selection.rule: Google and GitHub are peer OAuth signup providers with no documented default; do not invent a winner when the choice changes external identity handoffs.

candidates.name: Google OAuth signup, $5 prepaid credits, Default Project API key, Python first query
candidates.reason: Complete after identity choice, but Google versus GitHub remains an equal consequential signup fork.

candidates.name: GitHub OAuth signup, $5 prepaid credits, Default Project API key, Python first query
candidates.reason: Peer of the Google route with a different external authorization surface and future sign-in lock-in.

candidates.name: OpenAI SDK pointed at Together base URL
candidates.reason: Alternate client after the same unresolved account, billing, and key prerequisites.

required_path.action: Register via together.ai Get Started using Google or GitHub OAuth.

required_fields.label: Provider authorization consent
required_fields.notes: Together documents OAuth but not the provider consent screens or scopes.

required_path.observable_result: An organization with a Default Project exists for the new account.

required_path.action: Add a payment method and purchase the minimum prepaid credits required for platform access.
required_path.observable_result: The account has a positive prepaid credit balance.

required_path.action: Create a project API key, name it, and copy the value immediately.
required_path.observable_result: A project API key value is available to export as TOGETHER_API_KEY.

required_path.action: Export TOGETHER_API_KEY and install the Together Python SDK.
required_path.observable_result: The together package is installed and the key is in the environment.

required_path.action: Run the published MiniMax M3 chat.completions.create example and print the content.
required_path.observable_result: The terminal prints the model response.

prerequisites.description: Together uses OAuth only; the developer must have Google or GitHub available and must reuse the same provider later.

external_gates.description: Google or GitHub OAuth authorization is required to create the account.
No free trial: a minimum $5 prepaid credit purchase is required for platform access.

platform_outcomes.description: Together returns a chat completion for the Quickstart model and messages.

excluded.reason: Documented as going-further after the first printed response.
Optional billing automation after the minimum prepaid balance exists.

sources.title: Credits
evidence_supported: Prepaid balance required before API calls

uncertainties.question: Which OAuth provider should a new developer use when Google and GitHub are documented as peers with no default?
uncertainties.impact: Provider choice changes external consent screens, scopes, and permanent sign-in method, so lexicographic route selection cannot pick a single verified path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: An official default recommendation, or a human decision selecting one provider plus a walkthrough of that provider's current consent screens.

uncertainties.question: What exact payment-method fields and bank or card verification challenges appear during the required $5 purchase?
uncertainties.impact: Billing step field counts remain incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Observed billing settings walkthrough for a fresh organization completing the minimum credit purchase.
